listeners.purpose: Auto-issue a user_scoped referral code for the newly-activated user. Dispatches IssueReferralCodeJob per active program on the tenant. Idempotent: skips programs where the user already has a code.
Reads AttributionSnapshotBuilder output (from growth::attribution) and freezes into referral.attribution_snapshot. Runs synchronously inside the create transaction (priority 10 = first).

Fires a marketing::MarketingEvent for ad-network conversion attribution. Reads referral.attribution_snapshot and forwards to the marketing module's MarketingEventCapturer. The marketing module fans out to configured ad networks (Meta CAPI, Google Ads Enhanced Conversions, TikTok Events API, etc.).

Fires a marketing::MarketingEvent for the higher-tier 'vested conversion' — often the ad-network events with revenue attribution (value in USD). Distinct from ReferralSignedUp because vested means the referred user completed the tenant's chosen trigger event (typically first_payment).
Dispatches MaterializeVestedRewardsJob for each reward created by the vested transition. Runs before notification listeners so notifications reflect the materialized state.

Re-runs FraudDetector at trigger time — catches fraud signals that only surface after the referred user has been in the tenant for a while (velocity, click_storm, geographic mismatch discovered post-signup).
Cancels pending referrals owned by the erased user; retains paid rewards with recipient redacted.
Schedules a 90-day-post-erasure redaction of referred_email + user-identifying attribution snapshot fields on referrals where the erased user was the referred party. Retention window unchanged.
Wave 4 bridge. Dispatches ClawbackRewardsOnRefundJob to reverse any ReferralReward tied to the refunded payment.
Higher-severity clawback path. Marks the referrer's fraud-flag counters (chargeback abuse = fraud signal).
Cascades: cancels non-terminal referrals + clawbacks materialized-not-yet-paid rewards.
Cascade delete via FK; writes compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics. Paid rewards > $600 migrate to compliance_archive first.

When an anonymous session identifies (attribution.subject_type transitions to 'user'), check if a pending_claim referral exists with the same session_id/device_hash. If yes, transition the referral to 'claimed' + set referred_id.
